records.title: Control fixture where expected and observed agree
records.revision_reason: ensure the validator can preserve a non-contradiction control without treating it as a failed hypothesis
records.contradiction_summary: The synthetic expected result and synthetic observed result agree, so this record is valid only as a control fixture.
records.expected_result: The candidate module preserves every required boundary field.
records.observed_result: The candidate module preserves every required boundary field.
possible_explanations: control fixture intentionally contains no contradiction
records.falsification_route: If the validator classifies this as a confirmed contradiction, the classification logic is wrong.
records.next_executable_action: Use this record as a negative-control fixture in regression tests.

records.title: Ambiguous fixture where missing measurement blocks contradiction status
records.revision_reason: prevent MC from converting incomplete evidence into false certainty
records.contradiction_summary: The observed result differs from the expected result, but the decisive measurement is missing, so this should remain ambiguous.
records.expected_result: The extraction step should increase mechanism specificity after source mapping.
records.observed_result: The extraction step showed unknown mechanism specificity because the decisive field was not measured.
records.falsification_route: If a later fixture includes the missing measurement and still shows no specificity gain, the original hypothesis becomes a candidate contradiction.
records.next_executable_action: Add the missing mechanism_specificity_score measurement to the fixture generator.

records.title: Confirmed fixture where invalid records pass without boundary fields
records.revision_reason: make failed validation behavior persist as reusable discovery memory
records.contradiction_summary: The expected validator rejection did not occur in the simulated regression case, creating a confirmed contradiction for the validator hypothesis.
records.expected_result: Invalid records should be rejected when required boundary fields are absent.
records.observed_result: Invalid records passed in the simulated regression condition.
possible_explanations: test fixture did not exercise boundary labels
records.falsification_route: The contradiction is falsified if the validator rejects this regression fixture and records the boundary-field error path.
records.next_executable_action: Run the validator against valid and invalid fixtures in a regression test harness.
